name: Antipasto-on-a-Stick
recipeIngredient: 8 slices cooked beef, cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll up the beef strips in a pinwheel fashion.
2. Arrange the beef pinwheels alternately with olives, cherry tomatoes, provolone cheese cubes, and artichoke hearts on eight 9-inch skewers.
3. Place the kabobs in a shallow container.
4. Pour the Italian salad dressing over the kabobs.
5. Refrigerate several hours or overnight.
6. To serve, arrange the kabobs on top of lettuce leaves.
7. Pour any remaining dressing over all.
